ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., male or female) */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cardiovascular_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient undergoing the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., ECG, stress test) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the test */,
  "test_results_file" TEXT /* File or document containing the detailed results of the test */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the healthcare professional who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cardiovascular_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the risk assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being assessed */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the risk assessment */,
  "recommended_interventions" TEXT /* Specific interventions or treatments recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "medication_class" TEXT /* Class of medication (e.g., beta blockers, ACE inhibitors) */,
  "medication_side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for lifestyle factors entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of exercise per week */,
  "diet_quality" TEXT /* Quality of diet (e.g., healthy, average, poor) */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level (e.g., sedentary, lightly active, very active) */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences (e.g., vegetarian, gluten-free) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., follow-up, consultation, surgery) */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "user_specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the user */,
  "user_facility" TEXT /* Facility or hospital where the user practices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the alert is for */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
